englishDefinitions: To push or pack things together tightly.
To block or make something stop moving or working properly.
persianTranslation: آن‌ها را گیر انداختن / مسدود کردن
examples: Don't jam them into the suitcase or the papers will wrinkle.
The driver had to jam them between two boxes in the van.
Too much paper can jam them in the printer.
